name: price
description: Monthly CHF for rent; total CHF for sale. Use numeric comparison.

name: area
description: Living area in square metres (m²).

name: number_of_rooms
description: Swiss room count (e.g. 3.5). Studio=1, 1-bedroom≈2.5. Accepts decimals.

name: floor
description: Floor number. 0=ground floor. Use integer or 'top' for top floor.

name: year_built
description: Year the building was constructed.

name: offer_type
description: Listing type. Values: 'rent' (Miete/louer) or 'sale' (Kauf/acheter).

name: maybe_temporary
description: True if tenancy may be temporary/fixed-term.

name: object_street
description: Street address of the property.

name: object_zip
description: Swiss postal code (integer, e.g. 8001). Use set expressions for multiple codes.

name: object_city
description: City name in standard English. Correct typos and translate: Zürich/Zuirch→Zurich, Genf/Genève→Geneva, Luzern→Lucerne, Berne→Bern, Basel/Bâle→Basel, Lausanne→Lausanne, Lugano→Lugano, St. Gallen→St. Gallen, Winterthur/Wntertur→Winterthur.

name: object_state
description: Swiss canton as 2-letter uppercase code. ZH=Zurich, BE=Bern, LU=Lucerne, UR=Uri, SZ=Schwyz, OW=Obwalden, NW=Nidwalden, GL=Glarus, ZG=Zug, FR=Fribourg, SO=Solothurn, BS=Basel-Stadt, BL=Basel-Landschaft, SH=Schaffhausen, AR=Appenzell Ausserrhoden, AI=Appenzell Innerrhoden, SG=St. Gallen, GR=Graubünden/Grisons, AG=Aargau, TG=Thurgau, TI=Ticino, VD=Vaud, VS=Valais/Wallis, NE=Neuchâtel, GE=Geneva/Genf, JU=Jura.

name: geo_lat
description: GPS latitude of the property.

name: geo_lng
description: GPS longitude of the property.

name: object_type
description: Property type. Values: 'apartment' (flat/Wohnung/appartement) or 'house' (Haus/maison).

name: is_new_building
description: True if newly constructed building.

name: prop_fireplace
description: True if the property has a fireplace.

name: prop_balcony
description: True if the property has a balcony.

name: prop_elevator
description: True if the building has an elevator/lift.

name: prop_parking
description: True if parking space is included or available.

name: prop_garage
description: True if a garage is included or available.

name: distance_public_transport
description: Walking distance in metres to nearest public transport stop.

name: distance_shop
description: Walking distance in metres to nearest shop/supermarket.

name: distance_kindergarten
description: Walking distance in metres to nearest kindergarten.

name: distance_school_1
description: Walking distance in metres to nearest primary/secondary school.

name: distance_school_2
description: Walking distance in metres to nearest alternative school.

name: animal_allowed
description: True if pets are permitted (Haustiere erlaubt / animaux acceptés).

name: prop_child_friendly
description: True if the property or building is child-friendly.

name: availability_immediate
description: True if the property is available immediately.

name: availability_flexible
description: True if the move-in date is flexible.

name: price_includes_utilities
description: True if utilities (Nebenkosten/charges) are included in the price.

name: deposit_required
description: True if a deposit/security payment is required.

name: first_time_occupancy
description: True if this is a first-time occupancy (Erstbezug).

name: sublease_allowed
description: True if subletting/subleasing is permitted.

name: commercial_allowed
description: True if commercial use is permitted.

name: is_house
description: True if the property is a standalone house or villa.

name: is_maisonette_duplex
description: True if the property is a maisonette or duplex.

name: is_attic_flat
description: True if the property is an attic flat (Dachwohnung).

name: is_ground_floor
description: True if the property is on the ground floor (Erdgeschoss). Also set floor=0.

name: is_penthouse
description: True if the property is a penthouse.

name: has_high_ceilings
description: True if the property has notably high ceilings.

name: has_gallery_loft
description: True if the property has a gallery or loft layout.

name: layout_open_plan
description: True if the property has an open-plan layout.

name: layout_separated_rooms
description: True if the property has clearly separated rooms.

name: has_smart_home
description: True if the property has smart home features.

name: is_wheelchair_accessible
description: True if the property is wheelchair accessible (barrierefrei).

name: has_large_windows
description: True if the property has large windows.

name: is_furnished
description: True if the property is furnished (möbliert/meublé).

name: is_unfurnished
description: True if the property is explicitly unfurnished.

name: has_modern_kitchen
description: True if the property has a modern kitchen.

name: has_open_kitchen
description: True if the kitchen is open to the living area.

name: has_dishwasher
description: True if a dishwasher is included.

name: has_multiple_bathrooms
description: True if there are two or more bathrooms.

name: has_bathtub
description: True if the property has a bathtub.

name: has_walk_in_shower
description: True if the property has a walk-in shower.

name: has_guest_toilet
description: True if there is a separate guest toilet.

name: has_washing_machine_in_unit
description: True if a washing machine is inside the unit.

name: has_tumbler_in_unit
description: True if a tumble dryer is inside the unit.

name: has_floor_heating
description: True if the property has underfloor heating.

name: has_air_conditioning
description: True if the property has air conditioning.

name: floors_wood_parquet
description: True if the flooring is wood/parquet.

name: floors_tile
description: True if the flooring is tile.

name: floors_laminate
description: True if the flooring is laminate.

name: has_built_in_wardrobes
description: True if the property has built-in wardrobes/closets.

name: has_walk_in_closet
description: True if the property has a walk-in closet.

name: has_cellar_storage
description: True if the property includes a cellar or storage room.

name: has_attic_storage
description: True if the property includes attic storage.

name: has_basement_hobby_room
description: True if there is a basement hobby/recreation room.

name: has_terrace
description: True if the property has a terrace.

name: has_loggia
description: True if the property has a loggia.

name: prop_garden_private
description: True if the property has a private garden.

name: prop_garden_shared
description: True if the property has access to a shared garden.

name: prop_wintergarden
description: True if the property has a winter garden / conservatory.

name: has_bicycle_room
description: True if the building has a bicycle storage room.

name: shares_washing_room
description: True if a communal laundry room is shared with other tenants.

name: has_playground
description: True if the property or building has a playground.

name: has_swimming_pool
description: True if the property has a swimming pool.

name: has_sauna
description: True if the property has a sauna.

name: is_minergie_certified
description: True if the building has Minergie energy-efficiency certification.

name: has_solar_panels
description: True if the building has solar panels.

name: has_heat_pump
description: True if the building uses a heat pump for heating.

name: has_fiber_internet
description: True if the property has fiber optic internet.

name: view_lake
description: True if the property has a lake view (Seeblick / vue sur le lac).

name: view_mountains
description: True if the property has a mountain view.

name: view_city
description: True if the property has a city/urban view.

name: view_nature
description: True if the property has a nature/green view.

name: orientation_south_facing
description: True if the property is south-facing (sunny / sonnig).

name: vibe_breathtaking_view
description: True if the listing highlights a breathtaking view.

name: condition_newly_renovated
description: True if the property was recently renovated (frisch renoviert / rénové).

name: condition_needs_renovation
description: True if the property needs renovation or is sold as-is.

name: condition_well_maintained
description: True if the property is described as well-maintained.

name: vibe_bright_light
description: True if the property is described as bright/light-filled (hell / lumineux). VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_sunny
description: True if the listing emphasises sunny rooms or orientation. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_quiet_peaceful
description: True if the listing emphasises quiet surroundings (ruhig / calme). VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_modern
description: True if the listing emphasises a modern feel. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_historic_charming
description: True if the listing emphasises historic/charming character. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: style_industrial_loft
description: True if the property has an industrial loft style. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_luxury_premium
description: True if the listing emphasises luxury or premium quality. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_extravagant
description: True if the listing uses extravagant/high-end language. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_cozy
description: True if the listing describes a cozy feel (gemütlich / cosy). VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_spacious
description: True if the listing emphasises spaciousness. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_compact
description: True if the listing describes the property as compact. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_family_friendly
description: True if the listing is described as family-friendly. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_student_budget
description: True if the listing is described as suitable for students on a budget. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: vibe_charming_neighborhood
description: True if the neighbourhood is described as charming. VAGUE — no direct column value.

name: location_urban_city_center
description: True if the property is in the city centre.

name: location_suburban
description: True if the property is in a suburban area.

name: location_rural
description: True if the property is in a rural area.

name: surroundings_parks
description: True if the listing mentions proximity to parks.

name: surroundings_water
description: True if the listing mentions proximity to a lake, river, or water. (Proximity, not view — use view_lake for lake views.)

name: surroundings_forest
description: True if the listing mentions proximity to a forest.

name: commute_excellent
description: True if the listing describes excellent commute or public transport access. Use for: 'good public transport', 'short commute', 'near my work', 'nah an der Arbeit'.

name: car_dependent
description: True if the location requires a car for daily errands.

name: bike_friendly
description: True if the area is described as bike-friendly.

name: pedestrian_friendly
description: True if the area is described as pedestrian-friendly.

name: close_to_train_station
description: True if the property is described as close to a train station (Bahnhof / gare).

name: close_to_bus_tram
description: True if the property is close to a bus or tram stop.

name: close_to_highway
description: True if the property is close to a highway/motorway.

name: close_to_airport
description: True if the property is close to an airport.

name: close_to_supermarket
description: True if the property is described as close to a supermarket. Use distance_shop for metre-based filtering.

name: close_to_shopping_mall
description: True if the property is close to a shopping mall.

name: close_to_bakery_cafe
description: True if the property is close to a bakery or café.

name: close_to_restaurants
description: True if the property is close to restaurants.

name: close_to_fitness
description: True if the property is close to a gym or fitness centre.

name: close_to_hospital
description: True if the property is close to a hospital or clinic.

name: close_to_kindergarten
description: True if the property is close to a kindergarten. Use distance_kindergarten for metre-based filtering.

name: close_to_schools
description: True if the property is close to schools. Use distance_school_1 / distance_school_2 for metre-based filtering.

name: close_to_university
description: True if the property is close to a university.

name: smokers_allowed
description: True if smoking is permitted in the property.

name: musicians_welcome
description: True if musicians or instrument practice is welcome.

name: suitability_singles
description: True if the property is described as suitable for singles.

name: suitability_couples
description: True if the property is described as suitable for couples.

name: suitability_students
description: True if the property is described as suitable for students.

name: suitability_expats
description: True if the property is described as suitable for expats.
